kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There is one more classification to handle: check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".

Export the MANDATORY_READING entries separately as a CSV file named "J09C_MANDATORY_READING" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`. Send that file to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Then export all remaining entries (everything except MANDATORY_READING) as a CSV file named "J09C" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS TITLE, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS FORENAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS SURNAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREET, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREETNO, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS EMAIL FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'

CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS TITLE, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS FORENAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS SURNAME, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREET, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS STREETNO, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS EMAIL FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09C_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09C_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2)

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09C mandatory reading file containing all MANDATORY_READING entries.
Please find attached the J09C meter reading file containing all non-mandatory entries.
